name: zobia-social
description: Zobia Social — Gamified Monetised Social Platform

scripts.build:expo: cd apps/expo && eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.build:expo:prod: cd apps/expo && eas build --platform android --profile production

comment:overrides: Do NOT add `react`/`react-dom` here. This is an npm workspace: apps/web needs react ^18.3.1 (Next 15) and apps/expo needs react 18.2.0 (react-native 0.74.5). A global override forces ONE react into BOTH subtrees; forcing 18.3.1 into the Expo bundle makes RN 0.74's renderer hit mismatched React internals and crash at the earliest init — AppRegistry registers n=0 callable modules (silent white screen, no redbox). Each workspace pins its own react instead; the lockfile already nests them correctly (expo 18.2.0, root 18.3.1). `scheduler` is pinned to 0.23.2, which is compatible with both react copies.
